preamble.title: cip113/kyc-extended
preamble.description: CIP113 Sub Standard for KYC extended verification with MPF receiver allowlist

aiken/merkle_patricia_forestry/Neighbor.title: Neighbor
aiken/merkle_patricia_forestry/Neighbor.description: since | 1.0.0 --- | --- A neighbor node used in a proof. See [Proof](#Proof) for details.

aiken/merkle_patricia_forestry/ProofStep.title: ProofStep
aiken/merkle_patricia_forestry/ProofStep.description: since | 1.0.0 --- | --- We distinguish three kind of proof steps: Branch, Fork and Leaf. Each step contains a `skip` value which corresponds to the length of the common prefix at that particular level. The details of each level is documented [in the wiki :: Proof Format](https://github.com/aiken-lang/merkle-patricia-forestry/wiki/Proof-format).

cardano/address/Credential.title: Credential
cardano/address/Credential.description:
A general structure for representing an on-chain `Credential`.

 Credentials are always one of two kinds: a direct public/private key
 pair, or a script (native or Plutus).

kyc_extended_transfer/KycExtendedTransfe.title: KycExtendedTransferRedeemer
kyc_extended_transfer/KycExtendedTransfe.description: Redeemer for the kyc-extended transfer validator.

fields.title: global_state_idx
fields.description: Index into reference_inputs for the extended global state UTxO

kyc_extended_transfer/KycProof.title: KycProof
kyc_extended_transfer/KycProof.description: A KYC proof attesting that a user has been verified by a trusted entity.

kyc_extended_transfer/MembershipProof.title: MembershipProof
kyc_extended_transfer/MembershipProof.description: An MPF membership proof attesting that a PKH is in the receiver allowlist.

kyc_extended_transfer/SenderProof.title: SenderProof
kyc_extended_transfer/SenderProof.description: Sender proof union: either a live attestation or a membership inclusion proof.

types/global_state/GlobalStateDatum.title: GlobalStateDatum
types/global_state/GlobalStateDatum.description:
Types for the KYC global state UTxO.

 The global state UTxO holds mutable per-token state including the Trusted
 Entity List (TEL), transfer pause flag, mintable amount cap, and arbitrary
 security/compliance metadata.
 Datum stored in the global state UTxO.

fields.title: transfers_paused
fields.description: If true, no transfer can be executed

fields.title: mintable_amount
fields.description: Goes to zero when new tokens are minted, increases when tokens are burnt

fields.title: trusted_entities
fields.description:
Ed25519 verification keys (32 bytes each) of entities authorized to sign
 KYC attestations for this token

fields.title: security_info
fields.description: Regulation compliancy info, not directly used in the contracts

fields.title: member_root_hash
fields.description: Root hash of the MPF membership tree (32 bytes); empty = no members yet

types/global_state/GlobalStateSpendActio.title: GlobalStateSpendAction
types/global_state/GlobalStateSpendActio.description: Actions that can be performed on the global state UTxO.

types/global_state/GlobalStateSpendRedee.title: GlobalStateSpendRedeemer
types/global_state/GlobalStateSpendRedee.description: Redeemer for spending the global state UTxO.
